content_body: The Rolling River cabin fulfilled our hopes of a wonderful place to stay in luxurious comfort and enjoy the beautiful outdoors! Spending quality time with family!! Whitewater Rafting twice down the Ocoee. We did a 5 hour canoe trip, had good southern meals at Pat's Country Kitchen and enjoyed the great pastries at Mercier's Orchard. We look forward to returning again - we all agreed that this was a fabulous vacation!
title: Family Getaway " Blue Ridge Style "
